# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Datacenter Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: "Build script to run"
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: "Deployment command or script to run"
        required: false
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: "Working directory"
        required: false
        default: "."
        type: string

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 120
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Prepare environment
        run: |
          chmod +x "${{ inputs.build_script }}" || true
          if [ -n "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then chmod +x "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" || true; fi

      - name: Run build script
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.build_script }}

      - name: Run deployment command
        if: ${{ inputs.deploy_script != '' }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.deploy_script }}
